name: Orange Money Mali
description: Orange Money is the leading mobile money operator in West and Central Africa. The Orange Money Web Payment API lets merchants generate hosted payment pages from a server-side Bearer token obtained via OAuth2 client_credentials. This spec covers the Mali (ML) endpoint; the same API shape is exposed per country under /orange-money-webpay/{country}/v1/webpayment.
example_prompt: Add Orange Money Mali web payment to my checkout: obtain a Bearer token via OAuth2, create a hosted payment session, redirect the user to the returned payment_url, then verify the payment server-side from the notif_url callback before fulfilling the order.
